description: Task-type pattern registry for Phase 4 Agent Integration. Maps task descriptions to agent roles + learnings templates.

task_patterns.name: API Route Development
task_patterns.description: Creating new API endpoints, route handlers, middleware, or API schema changes
trigger_sections: API Development — Route Protection + Type Safety
examples: Implement Supabase RLS for breakdowns route
Create new API middleware for auth

task_patterns.name: QA Testing & Spot Check
task_patterns.description: Testing features, validating behavior across edge cases, running spot checks
examples: QA test new BM input form
Run spot check on 10 sample records

task_patterns.name: API Response Validation & Data Migration
task_patterns.description: Validating API contracts, checking data quality, running migration verification

task_patterns.name: Korean ↔ English Business Documents
task_patterns.description: Translating or polishing business emails, Excel files, PowerPoint, plain text between Korean and English
examples: Translate HQ email to India staff
Polish Korean document for English audience
Maintain terminology consistency in business document

task_patterns.name: UI/DB Schema & Architecture Design
task_patterns.description: Designing page layouts, component structures, database schemas, system architecture
examples: Design Travel module pages and tabs
Plan database schema for new feature

task_patterns.name: Monthly Team Alignment & Cross-Layer Consistency
task_patterns.description: Monthly audits, team coordination, glossary consistency checks, escalation decisions

multi_agent_patterns.name: Full-Stack Feature Development
multi_agent_patterns.description: End-to-end feature delivery: design → API → validation → QA

execution_sequence.output: Design Decision Memo (DDM) with glossary + schema

handoff_criteria: phase_2: API tests pass, types validated, migration tested
phase_3: 5-step validation complete, zero data quality issues
phase_4: Zero blockers, spot checks pass

multi_agent_patterns.name: Pre-Deployment Quality Gate
multi_agent_patterns.description: Multi-layer verification before production: QA + data validation + consistency check

execution_sequence.task: Validate API contracts and data quality

multi_agent_patterns.merge_criteria: All 3 agents sign-off (QA passed, data valid, glossary aligned)
multi_agent_patterns.escalation_path: If any agent blocks: escalate to secretary for priority decision

detection_rules.description: Rules for pattern matching and confidence scoring
steps: Extract task description from user input
Compare against all patterns in task_patterns[] using regex
If multiple patterns match: return highest confidence >= confidence_threshold
If no pattern >= threshold: fallback to base learnings (no auto-injection)
tie_breaking: If confidence scores equal: prefer task_patterns[] order (more specific patterns listed first)
If still tied: ask user for clarification or load all matching templates
false_positive_guards: Require minimum 2 matching keywords (prevent accidental activation)
Context check: ensure task description has >= 5 words (spam prevention)
Require explicit agent match (don't auto-inject if agent keyword absent)

fallback_behavior.description: What to do if pattern matching fails or has low confidence
behavior: If confidence < 0.60: Load base learnings (웹개발자-learnings.md equivalent)
If confidence 0.60-0.80: Load template + ask user for confirmation
If confidence >= 0.80: Auto-load template without confirmation

telemetry_logging.description: What to log for feedback loop
log_fields: sections_used: array of template sections referenced
code_changes: number of files modified (implicit quality metric)
